name: brave_search
description: Performs a high-quality web search using the Brave Search API. Returns results with titles, URLs, descriptions and publication dates. Requires a configured Brave Search API key. Prefer this over ddg_search when precision and freshness matter.

parameters.count: Number of results to return (1-20, default: 10)
parameters.country: Two-letter country code for localised results, e.g. 'DE', 'US' (optional, default from config)
parameters.lang: Search language code, e.g. 'de', 'en' (optional, default from config)

returns: JSON with status, query, result_count and results array (title, url, description, published)
